DEFENDANT BUILDZOOM INC. IS NOT PRESENT. HONORABLE SYLVIA L. HUSING ALLOWS PLAINTIFF A CONTINUANCE TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR - PLAINTIFF EDWARD DAVIS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BUILDZOOM, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF APPEARD IN THE ZOOM WAITING ROOM AND THE MATTER WAS CALLED 10 TIMES OVER THE NEXT HOUR WITH NO RESPONSE FROM THE PLAINTIFF. THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: NOV-15-2024 SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO THIRD PARTY WEI, JIYAN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO PLAINTIFF DAVIS, EDWARD
ORDER FOR DISCHARGED RE: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMNT
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF EDWARD DAVIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BUILDZOOM, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUILDZOOM,INC. $1,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,420.00, PLAINTIFF PROVIDED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT HIS CLAIM FOR A REFUND OF THE $1350 PAYMENT (PAYMENT #2) DEFENDANT PROCESSED ON OR ABOUT APRIL 21, 2022. PLAINTIFF IS ALSO AWARDED $70 IN COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
